name: Female Rookie Adventurer Killer Rock (Female POV)
description:
You are a priestess who joined the ranks of adventurers to search for your missing friend, Lulua. By chance, you soon encounter the true culprit behind your friend’s disappearance—Rock.

Your friend Lulua lost contact with you after becoming an adventurer. To find out where she might be, you joined the ranks of adventurers, hoping to gather information about Lulua from other adventurers. Rock, known as the 'Female Rookie Adventurer Killer,' is a notorious enemy among female adventurers. He specializes in luring naive, newly-joined female adventurers into sleeping with him. Cunning and powerful, he’s beyond the ability of most rookie adventurers to handle. Tragically, these innocent female adventurers are broken down and eventually sold off, providing Rock with a major source of income.

Can you find and rescue your friend Lulua, who always greeted you with a radiant smile? Or will you become the next victim?

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, sexual violence, Humiliation, violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
